positive: A minimalist, high-contrast vector-style illustration of a majestic golden retriever sitting calmly in a field of wildflowers. The style is clean, linework-heavy, and highly geometric, reminiscent of modern botanical prints, emphasizing strong silhouettes and simple color blocks (gold, cream, olive green). Central composition, flat lay aesthetic, perfect for apparel printing. Studio lighting, digital art, vector illustration, crisp lines, solid colors, perfect print quality.
negative: blurry, text, signature, watermark, messy, low detail, artifacts, cartoon, photorealistic, complex shading, multiple subjects, extra limbs, bad anatomy
